description: Seed metric patterns for retail KPIs. A pattern classifies a KPI's shape so its additivity and aggregation behaviour are decided consistently.

patterns.name: Additive currency amount
patterns.shape: Sum of a monetary fact at line/transaction grain.
patterns.aggregation: SUM across all dimensions and time.

patterns.name: Additive unit count
patterns.shape: Sum of a quantity fact at line grain.
patterns.aggregation: SUM across all dimensions and time; do not net returns silently.

patterns.name: Distinct transaction count
patterns.aggregation: Distinct count; safe to add across branches/days when the key is unique and time-bounded; never count lines.

patterns.name: Non-additive percentage
patterns.shape: Ratio of two additive bases, expressed as a percent.
patterns.aggregation: Recompute as SUM(numerator)/SUM(denominator) at each level; never sum or average the percentage.

patterns.name: Non-additive average
patterns.shape: Additive total divided by a count.
patterns.aggregation: Recompute as total/count at each level; never average the averages.

patterns.name: Semi-additive inventory snapshot
patterns.shape: Point-in-time stock state (on-hand qty or cost) captured per snapshot date.
patterns.aggregation: Additive across products/branches at one date; over time use last or average, never SUM across snapshot dates.
